verdict.answer_first: B leads with the exact command in line 1: `git reset --soft HEAD~1`; A first says `Use a soft reset` then gives the command.
verdict.decisiveness: B keeps one clear recommendation: `--soft is what keeps them staged`; A expands into a reset-mode table, which is useful but less decisive.
verdict.actionability: B is faster to execute because the first token is the command; A is also correct but adds extra reference material before the user needs it.
